scripts.check: node --check service-worker.js && node --check src/storage-core.js && node --check src/release-core.js && node --check src/quality-evidence-core.js && node --check src/production-release-ui.js && node --check src/boot-guard.js && node --check src/performance-monitor.js && node --check src/accessibility-core.js && node --check src/accessibility-ui.js && node --check src/accessibility-certification-core.js && node --check src/accessibility-certification-ui.js && node --check src/public-pages-ui.js && node --check src/mobile-lifecycle-ui.js && node --check src/mobile-viewport-core.js && node --check src/mobile-viewport-ui.js && node --check src/platform-core.js && node --check src/platform-ui.js && node --check src/install-audit-core.js && node --check src/install-audit-ui.js && node --check src/mobile-certification-core.js && node --check src/mobile-certification-ui.js && node --check src/beta-operations-core.js && node --check src/beta-operations-ui.js && node --check tools/configure-release.mjs && node --check tools/build-release.mjs && node --check tools/create-quality-evidence.mjs && node --check tools/audit-supply-chain.mjs && node --check tools/audit-release.mjs && node --check tools/validate-production-config.mjs && node --check tools/audit-accessibility-security.mjs && node --check tools/audit-package.mjs && node --check tools/audit-deployment.mjs
